title: Workspace Custom Avatar
excerpt: When uploading a custom workspace avatar, it is extremely difficult to use the crop tool to get your image to display without having the background color selection bleed off the edges of your custom avatar.  It looks qui…

posts.author: EBashkoff (Eric Bashkoff)
posts.cookedHtml: When uploading a custom workspace avatar, it is extremely difficult to use the crop tool to get your image to display without having the background color selection bleed off the edges of your custom avatar. It looks quite bad when the background of your avatar is white and there is no choice to set “white” as the background color, so if you choose blue or any other color for the background, you see variable amounts of blue bleeding off the 4 edges of your avatar. Please provide a choice for white, or even better, transparent. Thanks!

posts.author: Scarletioshub (Scarletioshub)
posts.cookedHtml: The current cropping tool causes background colors to bleed into the edges of custom avatars, which looks bad, especially when using white. Adding an option for a white or transparent background would solve this issue and improve the experience. It would be great to see this in a future update!
